name: caipe
description: AI-assisted coding, workflows, and platform engineering from the terminal

scripts.compile:darwin-arm64: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=dist/caipe-darwin-arm64 && codesign --remove-signature dist/caipe-darwin-arm64 && codesign --sign - --force --entitlements entitlements.plist dist/caipe-darwin-arm64
scripts.compile:darwin-x64: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile=dist/caipe-darwin-x64 && codesign --remove-signature dist/caipe-darwin-x64 && codesign --sign - --force --entitlements entitlements.plist dist/caipe-darwin-x64
scripts.compile:all: npm run compile:darwin-arm64 && npm run compile:darwin-x64 && npm run compile:linux-arm64 && npm run compile:linux-x64
scripts.compile: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=dist/caipe && codesign --remove-signature dist/caipe && codesign --sign - --force --entitlements entitlements.plist dist/caipe
